title: Vanilla Deluxe
description: A Minecraft Performence and Feature Modpack.
body:
The Vanilla Extra+ Modpack offers a variety of modifications specifically designed to enhance your Minecraft experience without sacrificing the classic Vanilla gaming experience. With a clear focus on performance and usability, the modpack ensures a stable and smooth gaming experience that benefits you as you explore, build and fight.

Mods such as __Chunks fade in__ improve the display of chunks, resulting in noticeably smoother gameplay. Enhancements like __Dynamic Crosshair__ give you a completely new crosshair that always adapts to your surroundings. __Bobby__ changes the viewing distance to give you a greater render distance on every server. __Client Sort__ optimises inventory management and automatically sorts your inventory.

Additional features such as __ShulkerBox Tooltip__ and __Notes__ make managing Shulkers and Notes in-game much more convenient, while __Reactive Music__ dynamically adapts the in-game atmosphere to your actions. __Xaero's Minimap__ and __Xaero's World Map__ keep you in the know no matter how big the world gets.

By integrating these mods, you get a balanced set of optimisations that give you small benefits in all areas of Minecraft - from performance to user experience. Vanilla Extra+ lets you get the most out of Minecraft without sacrificing convenience or speed.

---
## Credits
A big thank you to all the amazing mod creators for making this pack possible!
